# Mohammad Fazil — Digital Consultant (LLM Index)

> Senior Digital Consultant serving mid-size businesses in the UAE and Saudi Arabia. Specialist in SEO, Digital Marketing, AI Automation, and SaaS Development.

## Core Identity
- [Entity Home & About](/about) — Credentials, founding story, E-E-A-T signals, and strategic principles.
- [Services Hub](/services) — Overview of the 7 core digital consulting pillars.

## Service Deep-Dives (Truth Data)
- [SEO Expert Page](/services/seo) — Local SEO, technical auditing, and GCC-specific strategies.
- [Digital Marketing](/services/digital-marketing) — Full-funnel strategy for the Middle East market.
- [Paid Ads](/services/paid-ads) — Performance-driven media buying (Search, Meta, Snap, TikTok).
- [AI Automation](/services/ai-automation) — Workflow optimization and LLM integration for business efficiency.
- [SaaS Development](/services/saas-development) — Scalable product engineering for GCC startups and SMEs.
- [Web Development](/services/web-development) — High-performance, SEO-first conversion engines.
- [Social Media](/services/social-media-management) — Organic authority building for UAE & KSA platforms.
